issues.title: Conflicting Registry Table Definitions
issues.why: The parent (10-research/97-AC-10) and child (01-research-index/00-overview) define the 'RegistryEntry' table with different schemas (one has Domain/Slug PK, the other has RegistryEntryId PK).
issues.fix: Consolidate the RegistryEntry DDL into a single normative block in the child module and reference it from the parent.

issues.title: Date Format Ambiguity in Child Contract
issues.why: The JSON schema in 01-research-index/00-overview uses 'format: date' for openedAt, while the SQL DDL and parent AC-10 require ISO-8601 date-time.
issues.fix: Update the JSON schema 'openedAt' property to use 'format: date-time' for consistency with the SQL CHECK constraints.

issues.title: Stale Summary in Consistency Report
issues.why: The 'Known Gaps' section in 10-research/99-consistency-report.md claims 97-acceptance-criteria.md is 'planned' but it already exists and is populated.
issues.fix: Remove the 'Known Gaps' bullet point regarding missing AC files in the §99 report.
